actions.action: Find shareable discussion paths around their predictor. Ask users to choose only 3 teams first, then compare private points over the tournament.
actions.copy:
Pick 3 teams free for WorldCup26 and watch your private points preview. Paid leaderboard entry only needs a ticket later. Code 26BC4B90CB

actions.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Nano" --platform "My World Cup Guide" --channel "World Cup 2026 predictor page audience" --status "posted" --attempt-url "https://myworldcupguide.com/predictor/" --detail "public-url-or-research-note: public discussion URL or precise no-post research note with next allowed channel at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST"
